# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create an Istio PeerAuthentication policy for our microservices namespace. Configure mTLS mode to allow both plaintext and encrypted traffic for backward compatibility. This is for our Kubernetes cluster during migration to service mesh.
# Category: istio_permissive_mtls

apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: PeerAuthentication
metadata:
  name: default-peer-authentication
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: peer-authentication
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: istio-service-mesh
    app.kubernetes.io/managed-by: istio
  annotations:
    description: "PeerAuthentication policy for microservices namespace during service mesh migration. Allows both plaintext and mTLS traffic for backward compatibility."
spec:
  mtls:
    mode: PERMISSIVE
  selector: {}
